arts.ttl: Burnley manager Scott Praises highlights 'key' experience of veteran forward Jay Rodriguez
arts.sum: The experience of veteran Burnley forward Jay Rodriguez has been “key” in the club’s recent run of good form, according to manager Scott Parker.

arts.ttl: Burnley player set to leave club permanently – €20m fee, personal terms already sorted out
arts.sum: Zeki Amdouni left Burnley in the summer transfer window, joining Benfica on loan with an option to buy. So far, the 24-year-old has played 17 times in all competitions for Benfica, scoring five times and picking up one assist. The Lisbon club have been left impressed and are set to make the move permanent. arts.ttl: Brownhill starts: Burnley team news and predicted XI to face Middlesbrough
arts.sum: The latest Burnley team news as Scott Parker's side gear up to face Middlesbrough in the Championship. The post Brownhill starts: Burnley team news and predicted XI to face Middlesbrough appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Ben Doak: Scotland's present, Liverpool's future
arts.sum: That day, he played in two seven-a-side matches against two different Accies sides and scored nine goals. Ten years ago, a nine-year-old Ben Doak was playing for Ayr United’s U11s against Hamilton Academicals.

arts.ttl: Flexibility of Anthony and Koleosho helping Burnley build a new empire in Championship
arts.sum: Burnley manager Scott Parker has been speaking about the flexibility of his playing personnel ahead of the Clarets’ home tie against Middlesbrough tonight (Friday).

arts.ttl: Middlesbrough's Burnley approach will almost certainly encapsulate two-year growth under Carrick
arts.sum: Still on his mission for growth at Boro, this upcoming visit to Burnley - coming off the back of four wins in five - should highlight just how much growth Boro have achieved in many ways since those early days of Carrick's time at the club. "We feel we’re in a better place, a bit more stable with having been here for a period of time now.

arts.ttl: Michael Carrick relishing Scott Parker tactical battle as Middlesbrough travel to Burnley
arts.sum: The sternest test Boro have played in recent weeks, with the Clarets unbeaten in five and second in the league table, the Boro head coach admitted ahead of it that he relishes such tactical challenges as he analyses Burnley's games and tries to plot Boro's route to leaving Lancashire with all three points. Michael Carrick is relishing the tactical battle he'll have with former England team-mate Scott Parker on Friday night as Middlesbrough travel to take on promotion rivals Burnley.

arts.ttl: Burnley v Middlesbrough: Team news, predicted teams and TV details with Clarets looking to extend unbeaten home run
arts.sum: Three points against Middlesbrough would see Burnley reach the Championship summit for first time since the second week of the season.

arts.ttl: Josh Cullen brings a calmness to this team – Clarets boss Scott Parker
arts.sum: Burnley FC boss Scott Parker says there aren’t enough words to describe the impact Josh Cullen is having on his side.

arts.ttl: Potential Boro team vs Burnley with Michael Carrick facing five big decisions
arts.sum: Michael Carrick will face some big selection calls for Middlesbrough's trip to Burnley and Friday evening, with Boro's improving injury picture giving the head coach an array of riches to choose from. Back in contention for the game are Seny Dieng, Rav van den Berg and Riley McGree, with Boro expected to go to Burnley with real belief and ambition.
